full-stack development (React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB) have been mastered on a basic level.

myself as a professional.
+216-93875504
Ghofranissaoui83@gmail.com
GHOFRAN ISSAOUI
FULL STACK WEB DEVELOPER
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Created a healthcare platform that includes a public landing page and personalized dashboards for
patients and doctors.
• Built a search and filtering feature that enables patients to locate healthcare providers by specialty and
area.
• Carried out the implementation of an online booking system for consultation with the scheduling
automated via Zoom and Google Meet.
• Developed and controlled an admin panel to manage doctors, patients, appointments, and approvals as
well as monitor important statistics such as the number of active users and the rate of appointments.
Ariena, Tunisia

Languages  & Framworks:

INSTITUT SUPÉRIEUR DES SCIENCES APPLIQUÉES ET DE TECHNOLOGIE
Final-year student in Computer Science   :  2024 - 2025
LYCÉE SAHAFA ELGHAZELA
Baccalaureate : 2023
WORKING EXPERIENCE
MEDICALE PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
April 2025 - May 2025
ONTT TOURISM PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
July 2025 - August 2025
• Created a tourism management platform that combined hotels, restaurants, and travel agencies with
categorization by region.
• Developed APIs and services to retrieve, sort, and present establishments dynamically to users according
to their location and preferences.
• Made a tourist complaint and feedback mechanism resulting in reporting of issues and raising the service
quality.
• Developed a mobile front-end interface with the smart search and filtering options for smooth user
interaction.
• Conceived a back-office administration board to control establishments, user grievances and access main
operational indices.
FASHION E-COMMERCE PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
Dec 2024 - January 2025
• Developed a full-featured online store for clothing with a public landing page, product catalogs, and
personalized user dashboards.
 • Implemented product search, filtering, and recommendation systems to enhance customer experience.
 • Integrated secure payment gateways, shopping cart functionality, and order management workflows.
 • Built an admin panel to manage products, categories, orders, and track key metrics such as sales, inventory,
and user activity.
 • Applied responsive design principles to ensure seamless experience across web and mobile devices.

WORKING EXPERIENCE
MEDICALE PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
April 2025 - May 2025
ONTT TOURISM PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
July 2025 - August 2025
• Created a tourism management platform that combined hotels, restaurants, and travel agencies with
categorization by region.
• Developed APIs and services to retrieve, sort, and present establishments dynamically to users according
to their location and preferences.
• Made a tourist complaint and feedback mechanism resulting in reporting of issues and raising the service
quality.
• Developed a mobile front-end interface with the smart search and filtering options for smooth user
interaction.
• Conceived a back-office administration board to control establishments, user grievances and access main
operational indices.
FASHION E-COMMERCE PLATFORM – FULL-STACK DEVELOPER
Dec 2024 - January 2025
• Developed a full-featured online store for clothing with a public landing page, product catalogs, and
personalized user dashboards.
 • Implemented product search, filtering, and recommendation systems to enhance customer experience.
 • Integrated secure payment gateways, shopping cart functionality, and order management workflows.
 • Built an admin panel to manage products, categories, orders, and track key metrics such as sales, inventory,
and user activity.
 • Applied responsive design principles to ensure seamless experience across web and mobile devices.
